texts.title: Sefer Yetzirah
texts.recommended_english_translation: Use text-specific specialist translations: Samaritan Pentateuch editions by Tal/Florentin; Memar Marqah by Macdonald; Ginza Rabba by Lidzbarski/Gelbert; Hekhalot by Schäfer/Davila; Sefer Yetzirah by Hayman/Gruenwald.
